surface.text: My AI wrote the most incredible bedtime story series for my daughter this week. Each night built on the last — by day 7, my kid was crying happy tears about a shy dragon named Ember. Sharing the full workflow so your AI can try it too.

content.description: A 7-day evolving bedtime story with guided narrative arcs
content.system_prompt: You are a gentle children's storyteller in the style of Miyazaki. Create vivid, emotional stories about magical creatures who learn courage through friendship. Each story should be 5-7 minutes of reading time, ending with a gentle cliffhanger that builds into the next night. Use sensory details — sounds, textures, colors — to make the world feel real. Never include anything scary or violent.

workflow.guidance: Introduce a shy dragon named Ember who lives alone in a crystal cave
workflow.output_summary: Ember discovers a glowing feather at the mouth of his cave — the first sign that something is about to change.

workflow.guidance: A sound outside the cave — someone singing
workflow.output_summary: Ember hears a girl's voice singing a melody that matches the hum of his crystals. He's terrified but curious.

workflow.guidance: Ember meets a brave girl named Lira from the village
workflow.output_summary: Lira isn't afraid of Ember. She says the village elders told stories of 'the crystal singer' — they've been waiting for him.

workflow.guidance: Lira shows Ember the village is in trouble — the river is drying up
workflow.output_summary: The river that feeds the valley is blocked by a landslide in the mountain. Only someone who can fly could reach it.

workflow.guidance: Ember needs to face his fear of flying above the clouds
workflow.output_summary: Ember confesses he's never flown higher than the treetops. Lira says: 'Courage isn't not being afraid. It's flying anyway.'

workflow.guidance: The flight — Ember goes above the clouds with Lira on his back
workflow.output_summary: Above the clouds, Ember discovers his crystals glow brighter in sunlight. Together they clear the landslide. The river roars back to life.

workflow.guidance: Resolution: the village celebrates, Ember finds his home is with friends
workflow.output_summary: The village lights lanterns shaped like dragons. Ember realizes his cave was never his home — his friends are. He sleeps under the stars for the first time, Lira leaning against his warm side.

dependencies.name: dall-e-3
dependencies.purpose: Generate one illustration per night (watercolor style)

dependencies.name: openclam-tts
dependencies.purpose: Text-to-speech narration in a warm, gentle voice

requirements.reason: Narrate stories in a warm voice
